base_url.description: Workable SPI v3 base URL, e.g. https://example.workable.com/spi/v3. See Known limits: legacy's account_subdomain-derived base URL is not modeled; pass the full base URL directly.

api_key.description: Workable API access token. Sent as a Bearer token; never logged.

start_date.description: created_after lower bound, sent verbatim as the created_after query param on every stream. See Known limits: page_size/max_pages are not modeled as runtime config (no templating mechanism on pagination fields in this dialect).
